title: ornithogalum durandianum
intro: Ornithogalum durandianum, also known as the starflower, is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, treating digestive problems, and acting as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, Ornithogalum durandianum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
